an1.258-267:1.1: (258) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my female lay followers in being the first to go for refuge is Sujātā, daughter of Senānī."
an1.258-267:1.3: (260) " … among those who are learned is Khujjuttarā."
an1.258-267:1.4: (261) " … among those who dwell in loving-kindness is Sāmāvatī."
an1.258-267:1.6: (263) " … among those who give what is excellent is Suppavāsā the Koliyan daughter."
an1.258-267:1.7: (264) " … among those who attend on the sick is the female lay follower Suppiyā."
an1.258-267:1.8: (265) " … among those with unwavering confidence is Kātiyānī."
an1.258-267:1.9: (266) " … among those who are intimate is the housewife Nakulamātā."
an1.258-267:1.10: (267) " … among those whose confidence is based on hearsay is the female lay follower Kāḷī of Kuraraghara."
